scripts.check:web: npm run typecheck -w @bsr-hub/web && npm run test -w @bsr-hub/web && npm run build -w @bsr-hub/web
scripts.runner:check: npm run typecheck -w @bsr-hub/runner && npm run test -w @bsr-hub/runner && npm run build -w @bsr-hub/runner
scripts.pages:check: npm run check:web && npm run runner:check && npm run pages:build
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace
scripts.check: npm run check:rust && npm run check:web && npm run runner:check
